title: Exciting opportunity: Beautiful properties to choose from and a chance to receive cash
description: BUSINESS NEWS - LDM Properties has an...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - LDM Properties has an exciting opportunity for you to receive your share of R20 000, when you successfully refer a buyer to properties through Mossel Bay's master property practitioner.

The company was founded by Loretta de Moor.


> After her many years in the reality industry, De Moor decided to build her own brand in Mossel Bay, the town in which she grew up.


She wished to share her vast knowledge and experience of the property world with the community she so loves.

Her knowledge of the town, along with her expertise, has led De Moor to develop an estate agency that provides its buyers and sellers with a range of professional property services, tailored to their wishes and needs.

These services include residential and farm properties as well as property development. With a passion for client care and the real estate industry, LDM Properties ensures complete satisfaction for each of their clients.

This includes LDM Properties' exciting new offer: you can receive a share of R20 000 on referring a buyer to the following choices listed by LDM Properties:

Lifestyle and business:

- The gorgeous Good Hope Private Game Reserve. Stretching over more than 3 500 hectares, this property houses stunning lodges, a restaurant, a wedding venue and still more, for a price of R75 million.
- Org de Rac. South Africa's first 100% certified organic wine farm, situated in Piketberg. This property offers 250 hectares of organic wine and citrus farming for R39 million.

Holiday homes:

- Malgas. Located on the banks of the Breede River is a six-bedroom family home, with a boat garage. The home is low maintenance and is priced at R6.5 million.
- Mossel Cove. This property can also be used as an Air BnB. There are two top-floor units available, offering open-plan living space, a covered terrace with a braai and a covered parking space for R2.85 million.

Residential properties:

- 17 Avenue, Mossel Bay. A three-bedroom, two-bathroom home with a lounge and dining room area, a kitchen, a scullery and wooden flooring. With a 1 400 square metre yard and a sea view from the garden, this large home is also close to local schools and the hospital.
- A spacious four-bedroom home with an extra large double garage, inside braai room and open-plan living areas situated near Village on Sea, Mossel Bay, for R2.85 million.
- Parkview, central Mossel Bay. Three bedrooms, one full bathroom, a guest bathroom and beautiful sea views. Unrenovated, the home costs R2.2 million. With the bathroom and kitchen renovated, the house will cost R2.7 million.
- Aloe Ridge, Island View, Mossel Bay. There are three units available directly from the developer. Perfect for new homeowners, retirees or rentals. There are no transfer duties on these units which include open-plan living spaces, covered parking and braai areas.

New development opportunities:

- The Point. A proposed 120-unit development, including building plans.
- The Opulent. Development launching in 2025. This includes between 11 and 20 apartments with two to three bedrooms. Reserve a unit today.
- Development opportunity near the Point. Between 25 and 30 apartments can be built on the 945 square metre property. This development is priced at R12 million.
- Pinnacle Point Golf Estate Villa. Beautiful sea views, open plan living area, two garages, a golf cart and furniture are included. This is priced at R2.95 million.


> Gallery: Exciting opportunity: Beautiful properties to choose from and a chance to receive cash


LDM Properties has recently invested in Pinnacle Café, located at Pinnacle Point Estate.

The café sells signed apparel of professional golfer, Louis Oosthuizen, the perfect gift for family and friends.


> The operational manager and co-owner is Yolanda Brown. The Pinnacle Café is next door to the gym and is the perfect place for golf and wine lovers to visit.


For more information about these properties and receiving your share of R20 000, contact Loretta de Moor (082 928 0262). You can also visit the LDM Properties website (www.ldmpropertygroup.co.za) or Facebook page (LDM Properties).

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
